title: PhIP Bundle Manifest
description: Schema for the manifest.json file inside a PhIP bundle (Section 4.3.4). The bundle is a signed archive of objects + their histories + key resources, used for offline distribution, mirror snapshots, and air-gapped imports. The manifest is the integrity anchor: signed by the producer's actor key, listing every object in the bundle with its expected history_head.

bundle_version.description: Bundle format version. MUST be '1.0' for this revision of the spec.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the bundle was assembled.

created_by.description: PhIP URI of the actor producing the bundle. The signature is computed by this actor's key.

authority.description: Source authority name whose records are being bundled.

history_head.description: SHA-256 hash of the latest event in this object's history at bundle-creation time.

objects.description: Per-object integrity manifest. Consumers verify each object's full chain reaches this head.

snapshot_of.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp this bundle represents the source authority's state as of. For continuously-updated mirror snapshots; absent for ad-hoc exports.

key_id.description: Key actor URI whose phip:keys material verifies this signature. SHOULD match created_by or be derivable from it.

value.description: Base64url-encoded 64-byte Ed25519 signature (exactly 86 base64url characters, no padding) over the JCS canonicalization of the manifest with the signature field removed.
